statusLine.command: input=$(cat); cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir'); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name'); remaining=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.remaining_percentage // empty'); dir_name=$(basename "$cwd"); cd "$cwd" 2>/dev/null && branch=$(git -c advice.detachedHead=false -c core.useBuiltinFSMonitor=false rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); ctx_str=""; [ -n "$remaining" ] && ctx_str=$(printf ' \033[90m|\033[0m \033[33m%.0f%% ctx\033[0m' "$remaining"); if [ -n "$branch" ]; then printf '\033[36m%s\033[0m \033[90mon\033[0m \033[35m%s\033[0m \033[90m|\033[0m \033[34m%s\033[0m%s' "$dir_name" "$branch" "$model" "$ctx_str"; else printf '\033[36m%s\033[0m \033[90m|\033[0m \033[34m%s\033[0m%s' "$dir_name" "$model" "$ctx_str"; fi
